title: eriocaulon miquelianum f. involucratum
intro: Eriocaulon miquelianum f. involucratum, also known as the Pian Ma pipewort, is a type of flowering plant in the Eriocaulaceae family. It is native to the mountainous regions of China and is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eriocaulon miquelianum f. involucratum include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat gastrointestinal problems, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea, or by drying and processing the plant to create capsules or tablets.
